import { serializeString } from './string'; // Used for mapping isomorphic references export const REFERENCES_KEY = '__SEROVAL_REFS__'; export const GLOBAL_CONTEXT_REFERENCES = '$R'; const GLOBAL_CONTEXT_R = `self.${GLOBAL_CONTEXT_REFERENCES}`; export function getCrossReferenceHeader(id?: string): string { if (id == null) { return `${GLOBAL_CONTEXT_R}=${GLOBAL_CONTEXT_R}||[]`; } return `(${GLOBAL_CONTEXT_R}=${GLOBAL_CONTEXT_R}||{})["${serializeString( id, )}"]=[]`; }
